concepts.label: CSRF
concepts.desc: Cross-site request forgery — mutating calls need a session-bound token.

concepts.label: Sliding window
concepts.desc: Time-bounded counts — brute force and correlation both use short windows.

concepts.label: Kill chain
concepts.desc: From first signal through containment — deck path mirrors recon to action.

concepts.label: CVSS
concepts.desc: Severity scoring context for vuln intel and alert priority.

concepts.label: Lateral movement
concepts.desc: Same actor hopping hosts — incidents cluster IPs; maps show spread.

concepts.label: Impossible travel
concepts.desc: Same identity in distant cities too fast — geo map draws dashed links.

concepts.label: RBAC
concepts.desc: Role gates on write, admin, and export — server enforces, UI hints.

concepts.label: SQL injection
concepts.desc: Metacharacters in HTTP fields — rule plus server-side validation.

concepts.label: XSS
concepts.desc: Script and sink patterns in request bodies.

concepts.label: WAL mode
concepts.desc: Write-ahead logging — concurrent reads during demo writes.

concepts.label: MITRE ATT&CK
concepts.desc: Technique tags on alerts for mapping detections to known TTPs.

concepts.label: SOAR playbooks
concepts.desc: Block, watchlist, and audit after confirmed external abuse.
